name: Loan Repayment Comparison

tools.name: compare_loan_repayment
tools.description: Compare repayment plans, mortgage refinance scenarios, fuzzy-search providers, filter conditions, and return recommendation reasons.

tools.name: compare_generic_options
tools.description: Run a weighted comparison for non-loan domains.

notes: The comparison engine is reusable beyond loans: SaaS, products, vendors, subsidies, insurance, schools, and infrastructure choices.
Housing-loan refinance scenarios include monthly-payment deltas, reset-rate context, and fee/condition caveats.
Financial outputs are approximate simulations and must not be treated as formal loan approval or financial advice.
